--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Hadozee — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Hadozee — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Hadozee — Iron Concentration HP: 51/67
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Hadozee — Iron Concentration HP: 31/67
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 25 damage. Hadozee — Iron Concentration HP: 6/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Hadozee — Iron Concentration --- HP: 6/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (6/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Hadozee — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Hadozee — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Hadozee — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 23 damage. Hadozee — Iron Concentration HP: -17/67
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):13+8=21 vs DC 11] MAINTAINED!
